what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links attachment att-9bbf47d9, of type board_items, to board item item-b2f90553 in the dragnet-development channel and records when it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target is a board:// URI pointing to item-b2f90553
file has no body content beyond the frontmatter
timestamp is precise to microseconds with timezone offset
conventions: References a board item via the board:// URI scheme
Stores an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone
notes: A bare metadata stub that records a board-item attachment reference in the dragnet-development channel.
